content:
I'm collecting the list of pointers that we are using for some field projection work, am I missing any that are currently in-tree?

  • KBox<T>
  • KArc<T>
  • UniqueKArc<T>
  • ListArc<T>
  • ARef<T>
  • UserPtr
  • IoMem
  • &Mmio
  • CoherentBox<T>
  • Coherent<T>
Are there any other interesting pointers that we have on-list or in the works?

I remember that we want to have the following pointers:

  • AtomicPtr<T>
  • VolatilePtr<T> (or is that coherent or iomem from above?)
  • Rcu + Mutex (i.e. projecting from &Mutex<Struct> to &Rcu<Field> where Struct.field: Rcu<Field>)

Am I forgetting any?
We have Owned on list, not sure if that is interesting for your work?
oh yeah that would also be improved with field projections
(maybe not substantially, but it should be on the list :)
